sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 100

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 100:1
items.html:
(to the question) RIV [216]
The Kelim of AHP that are returned to the Partzuf at the time of Gadlut are discerned by the name of the Gematria RIV [216]. For being a discernment of Achoraim, they are discerned by the square of the Names; and being the discernment of the old Kelim from Nekudim, they are discerned as HaVaYaH with the filling of BON — and the square of the simple HaVaYaH together with the full one filled with BON is AB KDM, which in Gematria is RIV. See Answer 81. And the discernments of the Lights in them are from the HaVaYaH of AB, for the lower Hey does not descend from her place to raise the fallen AHP except through the drop of the Zivug from AB, as is known. Therefore the Lights in them are discerned as three times AB, which clothe in these returned AHP; and three times AB is likewise RIV in Gematria. (Items 10 and 17)
